summary: Tested Google Sheets integration features: Export, Auto-Sync config, and lead creation. All 9 backend tests passed. Frontend tests verified Google Sheets button, Connect dialog, Setup Required warning behavior, and mobile bottom nav.

features_tested.notes: Endpoint returns has_credentials:true when GOOGLE_SHEETS_CLIENT_ID/SECRET are configured in backend/.env
Auto-sync config endpoint saves enabled, interval_hours, spreadsheet_url, column_mapping
Export correctly returns 401 'Google Sheets not connected' when OAuth not completed

features_tested.feature: POST /api/crm/leads allows Super Admin to create leads
features_tested.notes: Super Admin can create pre_sales and sales leads with all required fields
Page loads correctly with Lead Distribution Engine, team stats, and recent leads

features_tested.feature: Google Sheets button visible in header
features_tested.notes: Button with data-testid='connect-sheets-btn' is visible and clickable

features_tested.feature: Clicking Sheets button opens Connect dialog
features_tested.notes: Dialog shows 'Connect Google Sheets' title with 'Not Connected' status

features_tested.feature: 'Connect Google Account' button visible in dialog
features_tested.notes: Button is visible when has_credentials=true but is_connected=false

features_tested.feature: 'Setup Required' warning NOT shown when has_credentials=true
features_tested.notes: Warning correctly hidden since GOOGLE_SHEETS_CLIENT_ID/SECRET are configured

features_tested.feature: Export button hidden when sheets not connected
features_tested.notes: Export button correctly not shown when is_connected=false

features_tested.feature: Mobile bottom nav shows on marketing-board at 390px
features_tested.notes: MobileBottomNav visible with 5 items: Dashboard, Projects, GMCenter, Alerts, More

critical_code_review_comments: Google Sheets OAuth credentials properly configured in backend/.env
Auto-sync config endpoints properly save/retrieve user-specific settings
Export endpoint correctly validates OAuth connection before proceeding
Frontend correctly shows/hides UI elements based on has_credentials and is_connected state
data-testid attributes properly set for testing (connect-sheets-btn, export-sheets-btn, sync-now-btn)
seed_data_creation: Test leads created and cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google Sheets OAuth is configured but not connected (user hasn't completed OAuth flow). The backend has has_credentials=true because CLIENT_ID/SECRET are in .env, but is_connected=false because no access tokens exist. Export returns 401 (expected), Connect Google Account button shows, Export/Sync buttons hidden (correct). Auto-sync config works without sheets connection. All tests passing.
